next_action: CORRECTION (full-rank fix per rigor review 21014faa7): the prior DEFER row metric -7.6e-13 was a RANK-1 TAUTOLOGY of _build_multiop_problem_spec (all 5 operators built as (seg_agg,pose_agg,rate_agg) x scalar_leverage => operator-gradient matrix RANK 1 => zero synergy-axis polytope volume FOR ANY input => Dykstra synergy was an arithmetic image, not a measurement). FIX: derive each operator gradient from its OWN per-pair footprint via the Catalog #356 AxisDecomposition (replace_many seg/pose ratio != reorder_pair which touches rate axis -8 bytes). Operator-gradient matrix RANK now 3 (was 1; max cosine-distance ~1.0). CORRECTED FULL-RANK synergy on full-600: -2.13e-07 (1.5e5x LARGER than the rank-1 tautology; the rank-1 collapse was annihilating the genuine signal by 5 orders). VERDICT REMAINS DEFER: the genuine synergy -2.13e-07 is still 35.9x BELOW the V14-V2 -7.66e-6 threshold (2.78% of it) => multi-op synergy is REAL but sub-threshold on its own; single-op rate-attack remains Pareto-optimal at the frontier. The class-shift-is-the-lever conclusion now holds on a GENUINE MEASUREMENT, not a tautology. The multi-op DISTORTION route does NOT reopen (synergy real but ~36x too small to cross V14-V2 alone). FIRE-phase per Catalog #246 on a single-op candidate remains the only path to a realizable score; multi-op synergy NOT worth paid spend.
